title: VRStar Tech
description: A "Star Technology" inspired modpack for VR (and PC)
body:
## INFO ## ### THIS MODPACK IS STILL IN BETA, READ BELOW!
This is a fan made modpack inspired by "Star Technology" made in fabric with support for VR (and PC). Made and optimized for QuestCraft v5.0.0! **FOR QUESTCRAFT USERS:** One you have installed this modpack, please edit this instance and remove the **_Vivecraft_** mod. This will allow QuestCraft to use their modified version of Vivecraft. **FOR USERS WITH LOW RAM (2 GB or less):** This modpack **will still work**, but small problems may occur. We do know about this and are trying to fix it. We recommend adding the mod _AutoSystemGC_ to help with this, as we already ship our modpack with a premade configuration for it. -- This modpack has no relation to the creator of the "Star Technology" modpack in any way. This is simply a modpack inspired by theirs. -- There is no server version of this modpack yet, but it is in the works! -- ## NOTES ## Please note: This modpack **IS NOT FINISHED** and is **STILL IN BETA**, therefore it has room to improve and grow. We provide contant updates and changelogs with every update. -- ## Things that will be added ## 1. Tutorial/Quest like system 2. Better crafting recipies 3. Better optimizations 4. Better VR optimizations 5. Custom menu 6. Better base configurations
